use_cases: Full-screen hero background for landing pages requiring immersive 3D visuals
Animated nucleus particle visualization for creative portfolio sites
WebGL-based background effect for SaaS marketing pages
Abstract 3D animation component for media and entertainment websites
Shader-driven visual accent for developer tools documentation sites
ai_summary: A WebGL 2.0 shader visualization that renders an animated 3D nucleus effect using raymarching and trigonometric SDF techniques. The fragment shader computes a colorful, gradient-shaded atomic structure with continuous time-based animation. Optimized for use as hero backgrounds or standalone visual components in creative and SaaS applications.
